cards.name: 4 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: possessiveness, insecurity, hoarding, stinginess, stability, security, savings, materialism, wealth, frugality, boundaries, guardedness

cards.name: 9 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: being guarded, living beyond means, material instability, reckless spending, superficiality

cards.name: Ⅸ The Hermit
cards.interpretation: self-reflection, introspection, contemplation, withdrawal, solitude, search for self
